name: Justice Sanjiv Khanna
bio: Justice Sanjiv Khanna was appointed as the 51st Chief Justice of India on November 11, 2024. He has been a judge of the Supreme Court since January 2019 and is known for his meticulous approach to constitutional and commercial law. He is a graduate of the Delhi University Faculty of Law and practised at the Delhi High Court before his elevation to the bench. Justice Khanna has authored several landmark judgments in areas including electoral law, tax, and fundamental rights.
